author: nüdévise
title: Commissioning Pixel Artist
content: looking to commission a #pixelart #artist #lowpoly #pixelartist Pixel Artist my budget is $250-$300 i have a 2-3week hard deadline. $250 to start, $50 increase for deadline met as an incentive if interested please reply

title: LF Artist for Character Reference Sheet
content: LF artist that can do character reference sheet (the outfit provided is quite detailed) I will pay luna toy code, please show ur art in the reply and I may considerr
